title: opt_expr -fine to now trim LSBs of $alu cells too
body:
Extends #1213 for `$alu` cells, since `opt_expr -fine` is only run after `alumacc` in some flows.

Fixes #1262 

```
module opt_expr_add_test(input [3:0] i, input [7:0] j, output [8:0] o);
    assign o = (i << 4) + j;
endmodule
```
on `synth_xilinx` now produces:
```
   Number of cells:                 17
     LUT2                            8
     MUXCY                           4
     XORCY                           5
```
